releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.0.5
## New features 🚀
- Ability to use Pic2Tex for OCR. https://github.com/breezedeus/pix2text
## Special Thanks ❤️
- @Marlon154 Adding code for local OCR
## Commits
- cc2f024: add setting for self hosted instance (Marlon May) [#7](https://github.com/Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex/pull/7)
- edaa33c: add basic http auth for self hosted (Marlon May) [#7](https://github.com/Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex/pull/7)
- 7d9c379: update readme (Marlon May) [#7](https://github.com/Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex/pull/7)
- 9d8c8ed: fix readme mistake (Marlon May) [#7](https://github.com/Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex/pull/7)
- 8d139ad: add http to docker link (Marlon May) [#7](https://github.com/Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex/pull/7)
- 65dfa2c: Refactored code and added check if url does not end with / (Hugo Persson)
- e3fa44d: Merge branch 'master' of github.com:Hugo-Persson/obsidian-ocrlatex (Hugo Persson)
- 5c9801d: Updated readme (Hugo Persson)
- 07f33ce: Removed todo (Hugo Persson)
